aboutDescription: I hold a double major in Electronics and Telecommunications, along with two Master’s degrees—one in Industrial Engineering from Argentina and another in Business Intelligence & Analytics from Germany. I currently work as a Senior Solution Consultant in AI and Analytics at OpenText, a global leader in content management software. Throughout my career, I have led numerous projects and held senior roles in major technology companies. I frequently coordinate cross‑functional teams to meet complex project deadlines. Leadership comes naturally to me, yet I also enjoy tackling challenges independently and solving problems with creativity and precision. I continue to strengthen my expertise in Analytics and Data Science as a PhD candidate at the National University of Córdoba (UNC), persistently pursuing my long‑time goal of earning a doctoral degree. Outside of work and research, I enjoy retro computing, long‑distance cycling, and peaceful walks in the forest. I currently live in southern Germany, embracing the experience of a new culture and the challenge of learning a new language.
